services.name: Website Chatbot
services.description: AI chatbot for your website — answers questions, captures leads, books appointments

services.name: Small Business Bot
services.description: FAQ + lead qualification + appointment booking for local businesses

services.name: Real Estate Bot
services.description: Property Q&A + lead capture + showing scheduler for agents/brokerages

services.name: Web Scraping / Data Extraction
services.description: Custom Python scrapers for any website — data pipelines, monitoring, reports

services.name: Python Automation
services.description: Automate reports, forms, APIs, data processing — any repetitive task

services.name: AI Workflow (n8n / Make / Zapier)
services.description: No-code/low-code automation workflows connecting your business tools

tier_definitions.basic: Template with client customization. Delivered in 2-3 days.
tier_definitions.standard: Custom build + 1-2 integrations (CRM, booking, etc). Delivered in 5-7 days.
tier_definitions.premium: Full custom + CRM sync + ongoing optimization + priority support. Delivered in 7-14 days.

retainer_pitch: Every delivery includes a retainer pitch: 'For $X/mo, I keep your bot updated, optimized, and running 24/7.'
removed_services: Trading bot white-label — Killshot lost $3K+, Hawk lost $1K. Do NOT sell trading systems until profitable internally.
